content: File created successfully[EDIT_DIFF]--- /workspace/database.py+++ /workspace/database.py@@ -1,3 +1,23 @@-from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy+import sqlite3+from flask import g-db = SQLAlchemy()+DATABASE = 'database.db'++def get_db():+    db = getattr(g, '_database', None)+    if db is None:+        db = g._database = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE)+        db.row_factory = sqlite3.Row+    return db++def init_db(app):+    with app.app_context():+        db = get_db()+        with app.open_resource('schema.sql', mode='r') as f:+            db.cursor().executescript(f.read())+        db.commit()++def close_connection(exception):+    db = getattr(g, '_database', None)+    if db is not None:+        db.close()File written: /workspace/database.py (23 lines)
